name: Farhad Ali
title: Manufacturing Associate & Aspiring Data Analyst
bio: Manufacturing Associate at Cepheid and student at San Joaquin Delta College. I am passionate about using data and analytical thinking to solve real world problems and improve how organizations operate.
whoami: Manufacturing Associate at Cepheid and student at San Joaquin Delta College. Interested in business analytics, data analysis, and operational improvement. Focused on using data to understand systems, identify inefficiencies, and support better decision making.
currently: Currently working as a Manufacturing Associate at Cepheid in a regulated cleanroom manufacturing environment supporting molecular diagnostic production. At the same time, I am a student at San Joaquin Delta College where I am developing skills in business analytics and data analysis while preparing to transfer to a four year university.
mission: My goal is to apply analytical thinking and data analysis to improve operational efficiency and help organizations make smarter decisions. I am particularly interested in roles where data can be used to solve real business and manufacturing problems.
status: Currently building analytics skills and preparing for opportunities in business analytics and data analysis.

experience.title: Manufacturing Associate I
